prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: story_clue, visually consistent. 手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。, 林澈低声说：这是谁发的？. Narration: "手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。". 林澈 says: "这是谁发的？". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: apartment_kitchen_or_hallway, pose: frozen); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: warm_and_unexplained). cinematic realistic suspense comic panel, stable young Chinese man identity, rainy old apartment, red mug as recurring clue, coherent low-cost storyboard frame. Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, text artifacts, logo, watermark, extra fingers, face drift, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, distorted limbs, burnt-in subtitles, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift
tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
